guidanceSteps.description: Teleport to Trollheim and run north to the God Wars Dungeon entrance
Enter the God Wars Dungeon.
Get 40 Bandos killcount by killing goblins, hobgoblins, or jogres in the main chamber
Enter the Bandos boss room and kill General Graardor
Teleport to Trollheim and run north to the God Wars Dungeon entrance
Enter the God Wars Dungeon.
Get 40 Saradomin killcount by killing knights and spiritual warriors in the main chamber
Enter the Saradomin boss room and kill Commander Zilyana
Teleport to Trollheim and run north to the God Wars Dungeon entrance
Enter the God Wars Dungeon.
Get 40 Zamorak killcount by killing imps, werewolves, or vampyres in the main chamber
Enter the Zamorak boss room and kill K'ril Tsutsaroth
Teleport to Trollheim and run north to the God Wars Dungeon entrance
Enter the God Wars Dungeon.
Get 40 Armadyl killcount by killing aviansie in the main chamber
Use a mithril grapple to enter the Armadyl boss room and kill Kree'arra

name: Zulrah
travelTip: Fairy ring BJS -> Zul-Andra (after Regicide), or Charter ship to Port Tyras

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to Zul-Andra using a Zul-andra teleport scroll or fairy ring BJS
guidanceSteps.travelTip: Zul-andra teleport scroll (fastest), or fairy ring BJS + run east

guidanceSteps.description: Board the Sacrificial boat to enter Zulrah's shrine
Kill Zulrah. Learn the rotation patterns for efficient kills

name: Vorkath
travelTip: Lunar Isle teleport -> Rellekka, or Fremennik sea boots -> Rellekka

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to Rellekka docks
guidanceSteps.travelTip: Lunar Isle teleport + talk to banker, Rellekka house portal, or Fremennik sea boots

guidanceSteps.description: Talk to Torfinn on the docks to sail to Ungael
Poke Vorkath to wake him, then kill him

name: Cerberus
travelTip: POH Taverley portal, or Key master teleport

guidanceSteps.description: Use a Key master teleport or teleport to your house in Taverley
guidanceSteps.travelTip: Key master teleport (fastest), or POH Taverley portal + navigate dungeon

guidanceSteps.description: Turn an Iron Winch to open a gate and enter the boss arena. Requires a hellhound Slayer task
Kill Cerberus. Protect from Magic, watch for the triple ghost special attack

name: Alchemical Hydra
travelTip: Fairy ring CIR -> Mount Karuulm, or Rada's blessing teleport

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to Mount Karuulm.
Take the elevator down into the Karuulm Slayer Dungeon.
Navigate past the regular hydras to the Alchemical Hydra instance. Requires Slayer task.
Kill the Alchemical Hydra. Use the coloured vents to weaken each phase — walk over the correct vent matching the Hydra's colour
Use a games necklace to teleport to the Corporeal Beast cave (level 21 Wilderness)
Enter the cave to reach the underground lair
Run past the dark energy core room to the boss chamber
Kill the Corporeal Beast. Spec with Dragon Warhammer/BGS to reduce its Defence, then use a zamorakian spear or equivalent
Travel to the Kalphite Lair entrance in the Kharidian Desert
guidanceSteps.travelTip: Fairy ring BIQ, or desert amulet to Kalphite Cave (with Hard Desert Diary)

guidanceSteps.description: Climb down the first tunnel entrance (use a rope if first time)
Navigate to the second tunnel and climb down to the Kalphite Queen chamber
Kill the Kalphite Queen (two forms: melee for first, ranged/magic for second)

name: Phantom Muspah
travelTip: Icy basalt teleport -> Weiss, or Ring of shadows

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to the Ancient Prison near Weiss.
Kill the Phantom Muspah.

name: Duke Sucellus
travelTip: Icy basalt -> Weiss, or Ring of shadows -> Ghorrock

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to Ghorrock Prison via Weiss.
Kill Duke Sucellus.

locationDescription: The Scar, accessed via Temple of the Eye beneath Wizards' Tower

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to The Scar beneath the Wizards' Tower.
Kill The Leviathan.
Travel to Lassar Undercity beneath Ice Mountain.
Kill The Whisperer.

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to The Stranglewood.

travelTip: Ring of shadows -> Stranglewood, or Fairy ring BLS -> rowboat

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to The Stranglewood.
Kill Vardorvis (Awakened).
Travel to the Slayer Tower.
Climb the stairs to the top floor.
Go through the roof entrance to reach the Grotesque Guardians.
Kill the Grotesque Guardians.
Use Drakan's medallion to teleport to Slepe, or walk via Canifis
Climb down the stairs in Slepe church to enter the Sisterhood Sanctuary
Run south to The Nightmare's arena in the Sisterhood Sanctuary
Disturb The Nightmare to start the fight. Protect from the active pillar attacks, run from parasites, and break the healing totems
guidanceSteps.completionChatPattern: Your Nightmare kill count is:

guidanceSteps.description: Use Drakan's medallion to teleport to Slepe, or walk via Canifis
Climb down the stairs in Slepe church to enter the Sisterhood Sanctuary
Drink from the Pool of Nightmare to enter Phosani's dream
Fight Phosani's Nightmare solo. This is a harder version with no downtime between phases
guidanceSteps.completionChatPattern: Your Phosani's Nightmare kill count is:

guidanceSteps.description: Teleport to Trollheim and run north to the God Wars Dungeon entrance
Enter the main dungeon and head to the frozen door to access the Ancient Prison
Get 40 Zaros killcount by killing Ancient Warriors, Mages, and Rangers in the Ancient Prison
Kill Nex in the Ancient Prison
Use Xeric's talisman (Xeric's Heart) to teleport to central Kourend, then run south to Forthos Dungeon
Enter Forthos Dungeon and navigate to the spider area in the south. Enter Sarachnis' lair
Kill Sarachnis. Use crush weapons, protect from ranged when she's red, protect from magic when blue. Kill the spawns quickly

name: Giant Mole
travelTip: Falador teleport -> Park, dig with spade

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to Falador Park
guidanceSteps.travelTip: Falador teleport, or ring of wealth to Falador

guidanceSteps.description: Kill the Giant Mole

locationDescription: Varrock Sewers (requires Mossy key from moss giants)

Use the Mossy key on the gate to enter Bryophyta's lair.
Kill Bryophyta.

name: Obor
locationDescription: Edgeville Dungeon (requires Giant key from hill giants)

Kill Obor.
Travel to Waterbirth Island, Rellekka.

Travel to Waterbirth Island, Rellekka.

Kill the Abyssal Sire
Travel to the Lava Maze in the Wilderness

Kill Chaos Elemental.
Travel to Scorpia's Cave in the Wilderness.
Kill Scorpia.

Kill Chaos Fanatic.
Travel to Venenatis' Cave in the Wilderness.
Kill Venenatis.

Kill Vet'ion.

Kill Callisto.

Enter the raid and scout rooms. Complete each room — combat, puzzle, and resource rooms — on your way to the final boss
Defeat the Great Olm in the final room. Dodge head attacks, run from crystals, and watch for flame wall specials
guidanceSteps.completionChatPattern: Your completed Chambers of Xeric count is:

guidanceSteps.description: Use Xeric's talisman to teleport to the Chambers, or use the Raids board at Mount Quidamortem

guidanceSteps.completionChatPattern: Your completed Theatre of Blood count is:

guidanceSteps.completionChatPattern: Your completed Theatre of Blood: Hard Mode count is:

guidanceSteps.travelTip: Barrows teleport (Arceuus 83 Magic), Barrows teleport tablet, or Fairy ring BKR

guidanceSteps.description: Dig on Dharok's mound (north-east) and kill Dharok the Wretched
Dig on Ahrim's mound (centre) and kill Ahrim the Blighted
Dig on Verac's mound (north-west) and kill Verac the Defiled
Dig on Torag's mound (south-west) and kill Torag the Corrupted
Dig on Karil's mound (south) and kill Karil the Tainted
Dig on Guthan's mound (south-east) and kill Guthan the Infested
Find the brother whose crypt has a tunnel entrance and climb down into the tunnels
Navigate the tunnel maze to the centre room and search the chest for loot
guidanceSteps.completionChatPattern: Your reward:

name: Tempoross
locationDescription: Tempoross Cove, south of Al Kharid

guidanceSteps.description: Use the Grouping teleport or sail from Al Kharid docks to reach Tempoross Cove
Board the boat when a game is starting. Fish harpoonfish, cook them on the cannons, then load them into the cannons to fire at Tempoross
After defeating Tempoross, search the reward pool for collection log drops. Higher participation gives more reward rolls
guidanceSteps.completionChatPattern: Your Tempoross subdued count is:

guidanceSteps.description: Use a games necklace to teleport directly to the Wintertodt Camp, or take the boat from Port Sarim
Enter the Wintertodt arena when the boss spawns. Chop bruma roots, fletch into kindling, then feed the braziers to earn points
Earn 500+ points per game for maximum reward crates. Open crates for Pyromancer outfit, Tome of fire, and Phoenix pet
guidanceSteps.completionChatPattern: Your Wintertodt subdued count is:

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to Zalcano's Prison, Prifddinas.
Kill Zalcano.
Use the Quetzal whistle to reach Varlamore, then travel to the Fortis Colosseum.
Enter the Fortis Colosseum.
Talk to Minimus to start a Colosseum run. Fight through 12 waves of increasingly difficult enemies.
Defeat Sol Heredit in the final wave. He has multiple attack styles and powerful special attacks — learn the mechanics for consistent clears
guidanceSteps.completionChatPattern: Your Fortis Colosseum completion count is:

Kill revenants in the caves for unique drops. Bring risk — it's multi-combat Wilderness.

Kill zombie pirates and use locker keys on the pirate lockers for loot.

guidanceSteps.description: Use the Grouping teleport to reach Giants' Foundry, or teleport to Falador and run south-east

Pour the metal into the crucible, then use the trip hammer, grindstone, and polishing wheel to shape the sword. Match the target profile shown on the heat gauge
Hand in the finished sword to Kovac for reputation points. Spend points at his shop for collection log items

Board Murphy's trawler and play Fishing Trawler rounds for unique fish rewards.

Take 25 buckets from the workbench

Climb ladder to upper floor
Empty buckets of water into the hopper
Climb ladder back to ground floor
AFK until the game ends, then spend Pieces of Eight on rewards

guidanceSteps.completionChatPattern: Your TzKal-Zuk kill count is:

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to Tar Swamp, Fossil Island.
Kill Deranged Archaeologist.
Travel to the Grand Exchange.
Buy Gourmet impling jars from the Grand Exchange.
Open jars to obtain easy clue scrolls (1/25 rate per jar).
Complete clue steps using the RuneLite Clue Scroll plugin.
Open reward casket for collection log items.
Travel to the Grand Exchange.
Buy Eclectic impling jars from the Grand Exchange.
Open jars to obtain medium clue scrolls (1/25 rate per jar).
Complete clue steps using the RuneLite Clue Scroll plugin.
Open reward casket for collection log items.
Travel to the Grand Exchange.
Buy Ninja impling jars from the Grand Exchange.
Open jars to obtain hard clue scrolls (1/25 rate per jar).
Complete clue steps using the RuneLite Clue Scroll plugin.
Open reward casket for collection log items.
Travel to the Grand Exchange.
Buy Dragon impling jars from the Grand Exchange.
Open jars to obtain elite clue scrolls (1/50 rate per jar).
Complete clue steps using the RuneLite Clue Scroll plugin.
Open reward casket for collection log items.
Travel to the Grand Exchange.
Obtain a master clue by trading one clue of each tier (easy, medium, hard, elite) to Watson in Hosidius, or as a rare drop from high-level PvM.
Complete clue steps using the RuneLite Clue Scroll plugin.
Open reward casket for collection log items.
Travel to the Grand Exchange.
Buy Ninja impling jars from the Grand Exchange.
Open jars to obtain hard clue scrolls (1/25 rate per jar).
Complete clue steps using the RuneLite Clue Scroll plugin.
Open reward casket for collection log items.
Travel to the Grand Exchange.
Buy Dragon impling jars from the Grand Exchange.
Open jars to obtain elite clue scrolls (1/50 rate per jar).
Complete clue steps using the RuneLite Clue Scroll plugin.
Open reward casket for collection log items.
Travel to the Grand Exchange.
Obtain a master clue by trading one clue of each tier (easy, medium, hard, elite) to Watson in Hosidius, or as a rare drop from high-level PvM.
Complete clue steps using the RuneLite Clue Scroll plugin.
Open reward casket for collection log items.
Travel to the Grand Exchange.
Buy impling jars from the Grand Exchange for your target clue tier (Young for beginner, Gourmet for easy, Eclectic for medium, Ninja for hard).
Open jars to obtain clue scrolls, then complete clue steps using the RuneLite Clue Scroll plugin.
Open reward casket for collection log items.

name: The Mimic
locationDescription: Triggered from master clue caskets (1/15 rate). No fixed location.

guidanceSteps.description: Travel to the Grand Exchange.
Complete master clue scrolls until The Mimic spawns (1/15 chance per casket). Enable Mimic encounters via the Strange casket in Watson's house if not already enabled.
